title: The Man Who Counts Cars
text_zh: 每天下午，一个老人坐在路边。他看着车，一个一个地数。我问他「你在做什么？」他说「我在看今天有多少红的车。」今天有十二个。
text_pinyin: Měi tiān xiàwǔ, yí gè lǎorén zuò zài lù biān. Tā kànzhe chē, yí gè yí gè de shǔ. Wǒ wèn tā「nǐ zài zuò shénme?」Tā shuō「wǒ zài kàn jīntiān yǒu duōshǎo hóng de chē.」Jīntiān yǒu shí èr gè.
text_en: Every afternoon, an old man sits by the road. He watches the cars, counting them one by one. I asked him 'What are you doing?' He said 'I'm seeing how many red cars there are today.' Today there were twelve.

questions.q_en: What is the old man counting?
When does he sit there?
How many red cars were there today?

title: What She Reads on the Train
text_zh: 火车上，对面的女人在看一本很大的书。我看不到书的名字。她看得很慢，有时候笑一下。到站的时候，她把书放进包里。我看到了——是一本中文书。
text_pinyin: Huǒchē shang, duìmiàn de nǚrén zài kàn yì běn hěn dà de shū. Wǒ kàn bú dào shū de míngzi. Tā kàn de hěn màn, yǒu shíhou xiào yíxià. Dào zhàn de shíhou, tā bǎ shū fàng jìn bāo lǐ. Wǒ kàn dào le——shì yì běn Zhōngwén shū.
text_en: On the train, the woman across from me is reading a very big book. I can't see the book's name. She reads slowly, sometimes smiling. When we reached the station, she put the book in her bag. I saw it — it was a Chinese book.

questions.q_en: What is the woman doing?

questions.q_zh: 「我」一开始看到书的名字了吗？
questions.q_en: Did 'I' see the book's name at first?

options.pinyin: tā shuō le shū de míngzi

questions.q_en: What kind of book was it?

title: The Dog That Waits
text_zh: 学校门口有一只狗。每天下午三点，它就来了。它坐在那里，看着出来的人。四点的时候，一个小女孩出来了，狗就跑过去。它每天都这样。
text_pinyin: Xuéxiào ménkǒu yǒu yì zhī gǒu. Měi tiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn, tā jiù lái le. Tā zuò zài nàlǐ, kànzhe chūlái de rén. Sì diǎn de shíhou, yí gè xiǎo nǚhái chūlái le, gǒu jiù pǎo guòqù. Tā měi tiān dōu zhèyàng.
text_en: At the school gate there's a dog. Every afternoon at three, it comes. It sits there, watching the people who come out. At four, a little girl comes out, and the dog runs over. It does this every day.

questions.q_en: Who is the dog waiting for?
What time does the dog come?
Does the dog come every day?

title: The Woman at the Window
text_zh: 对面楼的三层，有一个女人每天早上站在窗户边。她手里有一杯茶。她看着下面的人走路，不说话。八点的时候，她就不在了。她可能去上班了。
text_pinyin: Duìmiàn lóu de sān céng, yǒu yí gè nǚrén měi tiān zǎoshang zhàn zài chuānghu biān. Tā shǒu lǐ yǒu yì bēi chá. Tā kànzhe xiàmiàn de rén zǒulù, bù shuō huà. Bā diǎn de shíhou, tā jiù bú zài le. Tā kěnéng qù shàngbān le.
text_en: On the third floor of the building across the way, a woman stands by the window every morning. She has a cup of tea in her hand. She watches the people walking below, saying nothing. At eight, she's gone. She probably went to work.

questions.q_en: What does she have in her hand?
What floor does she live on?

questions.q_zh: 她八点以后可能做什么？
questions.q_en: What does she probably do after eight?

title: Two Umbrellas
text_zh: 今天下雨。我在商店门口看到两个人。一个人有伞，一个人没有。有伞的人看了看那个人，把伞给了他。然后自己跑进了雨里。我觉得很有意思。
text_pinyin: Jīntiān xià yǔ. Wǒ zài shāngdiàn ménkǒu kàn dào liǎng gè rén. Yí gè rén yǒu sǎn, yí gè rén méiyǒu. Yǒu sǎn de rén kàn le kàn nà ge rén, bǎ sǎn gěi le tā. Ránhòu zìjǐ pǎo jìn le yǔ lǐ. Wǒ juéde hěn yǒu yìsi.
text_en: It's raining today. I saw two people at the shop entrance. One had an umbrella, one didn't. The one with the umbrella looked at the other person and gave them the umbrella. Then ran into the rain themselves. I found it very interesting.

questions.q_en: Who ended up with the umbrella?

options.pinyin: yì kāishǐ méiyǒu sǎn de rén
options.text_en: the one who didn't have one at first

options.pinyin: yì kāishǐ yǒu sǎn de rén
options.text_en: the one who had it at first

questions.q_en: How is the weather today?
What did 'I' think about this?

title: The Same Table
text_zh: 饭馆里有一张桌子在窗户旁边。中午的时候，一个男人在那里吃饭。下午两点，一个女人坐在那里喝茶。晚上，两个朋友在那里说话。一张桌子，三个不一样的时候。
text_pinyin: Fànguǎn lǐ yǒu yì zhāng zhuōzi zài chuānghu pángbiān. Zhōngwǔ de shíhou, yí gè nánrén zài nàlǐ chī fàn. Xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, yí gè nǚrén zuò zài nàlǐ hē chá. Wǎnshang, liǎng gè péngyou zài nàlǐ shuō huà. Yì zhāng zhuōzi, sān gè bù yíyàng de shíhou.
text_en: In the restaurant there's a table by the window. At noon, a man eats there. At two in the afternoon, a woman sits there drinking tea. In the evening, two friends talk there. One table, three different moments.

questions.q_en: Where is the table?
Who was there at noon?

questions.q_zh: 晚上那两个人在做什么？
questions.q_en: What were the two people doing in the evening?

title: The Bus That Comes Late
text_zh: 公共汽车应该八点来。现在八点二十了，还没来。五个人在等。一个人看手机，两个人在说话，一个人在喝咖啡。只有我在看路。车来了，大家都很高兴。
text_pinyin: Gōnggòng qìchē yīnggāi bā diǎn lái. Xiànzài bā diǎn èrshí le, hái méi lái. Wǔ gè rén zài děng. Yí gè rén kàn shǒujī, liǎng gè rén zài shuō huà, yí gè rén zài hē kāfēi. Zhǐ yǒu wǒ zài kàn lù. Chē lái le, dàjiā dōu hěn gāoxìng.
text_en: The bus should come at eight. It's now 8:20 and it still hasn't come. Five people are waiting. One looks at their phone, two are talking, one is drinking coffee. Only I'm watching the road. The bus came, and everyone was happy.

questions.q_zh: 公共汽车晚了多长时间？
questions.q_en: How late was the bus?
How many people were waiting?
What was 'I' doing?

title: The Building with No Name
text_zh: 我家旁边有一个很老的楼。门上没有名字。白天没有人进去。但是晚上，里面有灯。我问妈妈那是什么地方。她说「以前是一个商店。」现在不是了。
text_pinyin: Wǒ jiā pángbiān yǒu yí gè hěn lǎo de lóu. Mén shang méiyǒu míngzi. Báitiān méiyǒu rén jìnqù. Dànshì wǎnshang, lǐmiàn yǒu dēng. Wǒ wèn māma nà shì shénme dìfang. Tā shuō「yǐqián shì yí gè shāngdiàn.」Xiànzài bú shì le.
text_en: Next to my home there's a very old building. There's no name on the door. During the day nobody goes in. But at night, there are lights inside. I asked mom what that place is. She said 'It used to be a shop.' Not anymore.

questions.q_en: What was this building before?
Does anyone go in during the day?
What is the building like at night?

title: Rain and the Taxi Driver
text_zh: 下雨的时候，出租车很难找。我在路边等了十五分钟。一个出租车来了，里面已经有人了。又等了五分钟，又来了一个。我上了车，说「谢谢，终于有车了。」
text_pinyin: Xià yǔ de shíhou, chūzūchē hěn nán zhǎo. Wǒ zài lù biān děng le shíwǔ fēnzhōng. Yí gè chūzūchē lái le, lǐmiàn yǐjīng yǒu rén le. Yòu děng le wǔ fēnzhōng, yòu lái le yí gè. Wǒ shàng le chē, shuō「xièxie, zhōngyú yǒu chē le.」
text_en: When it rains, taxis are hard to find. I waited by the road for fifteen minutes. A taxi came, but someone was already inside. I waited another five minutes, and another came. I got in and said 'Thank you, finally a car.'

questions.q_en: How long did 'I' wait in total?
Why are taxis hard to find?

questions.q_zh: 第一个出租车为什么不行？
questions.q_en: Why didn't the first taxi work?

title: The Quiet Street at Noon
text_zh: 中午十二点半，这条路上没什么人。商店都关门了，大家都去吃饭了。只有一个猫在路上走。太阳很大，猫走到一棵树下面，坐下来了。两点的时候，人又回来了。
text_pinyin: Zhōngwǔ shí èr diǎn bàn, zhè tiáo lù shang méi shénme rén. Shāngdiàn dōu guānmén le, dàjiā dōu qù chī fàn le. Zhǐ yǒu yì gè māo zài lù shang zǒu. Tàiyáng hěn dà, māo zǒu dào yì kē shù xiàmiàn, zuò xiàlái le. Liǎng diǎn de shíhou, rén yòu huílái le.
text_en: At 12:30, there's hardly anyone on this street. The shops are all closed — everyone went to eat. Only a cat is walking on the road. The sun is strong, and the cat walks under a tree and sits down. At two, the people come back.

questions.q_en: Why is there no one on the road?
What did the cat do?

options.pinyin: zǒu dào shù xiàmiàn zuò xiàlái
options.text_en: walked under a tree and sat down

questions.q_en: When do the people come back?

title: The Elevator Conversation
text_zh: 我住在十楼。每天早上坐电梯下去。电梯里的人都不说话。今天有一个小孩对我说「你好！」我说「你好。」他妈妈笑了。那天早上，我很高兴。
text_pinyin: Wǒ zhù zài shí lóu. Měi tiān zǎoshang zuò diàntī xià qù. Diàntī lǐ de rén dōu bù shuō huà. Jīntiān yǒu yí gè xiǎohái duì wǒ shuō「nǐ hǎo!」Wǒ shuō「nǐ hǎo.」Tā māma xiào le. Nà tiān zǎoshang, wǒ hěn gāoxìng.
text_en: I live on the tenth floor. Every morning I take the elevator down. People in the elevator don't talk. Today a child said 'Hello!' to me. I said 'Hello.' His mom smiled. That morning, I was happy.

questions.q_en: What floor does 'I' live on?

questions.q_zh: 电梯里的人平时怎么样？
questions.q_en: How are the people in the elevator usually?
Who said 'hello' first?

title: The Hospital Waiting Room
text_zh: 医院里有很多人在等。一个老人在看报纸。一个妈妈带着小孩，小孩在玩手机。我等了四十分钟了。护士出来叫了一个名字，不是我的。大家继续等。
text_pinyin: Yīyuàn lǐ yǒu hěn duō rén zài děng. Yí gè lǎorén zài kàn bàozhǐ. Yí gè māma dàizhe xiǎohái, xiǎohái zài wán shǒujī. Wǒ děng le sìshí fēnzhōng le. Hùshi chūlái jiào le yí gè míngzi, bú shì wǒ de. Dàjiā jìxù děng.
text_en: Many people are waiting in the hospital. An old man is reading a newspaper. A mother is with a child; the child is playing with a phone. I've waited forty minutes. A nurse came out and called a name — not mine. Everyone keeps waiting.

questions.q_en: What is the child doing?
Did the nurse call 'me'?
How long has 'I' waited?

title: The New Teacher
text_zh: 今天学校来了一个新老师。她很年轻，说话的声音很小。学生们都很安静地听。下课以后，一个学生说「我喜欢这个老师，她说的话我都听得懂。」
text_pinyin: Jīntiān xuéxiào lái le yí gè xīn lǎoshī. Tā hěn niánqīng, shuō huà de shēngyīn hěn xiǎo. Xuéshēngmen dōu hěn ānjìng de tīng. Xià kè yǐhòu, yí gè xuéshēng shuō「wǒ xǐhuan zhège lǎoshī, tā shuō de huà wǒ dōu tīng de dǒng.」
text_en: Today a new teacher came to school. She's very young and speaks softly. The students all listened quietly. After class, one student said 'I like this teacher — I can understand everything she says.'

questions.q_en: What is the new teacher like?

options.pinyin: hěn niánqīng, shuō huà shēngyīn hěn xiǎo

questions.q_zh: 学生们上课的时候怎么样？
questions.q_en: How were the students during class?

questions.q_zh: 那个学生为什么喜欢这个老师？
questions.q_en: Why does the student like this teacher?

options.pinyin: tā shuō de huà dōu tīng de dǒng

title: The Library Rule
text_zh: 图书馆里不能说话。一个男人在打电话，声音很大。工作的人走过去对他说「请到外面打电话。」他说「对不起」，就出去了。图书馆又安静了。
text_pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ bù néng shuō huà. Yí gè nánrén zài dǎ diànhuà, shēngyīn hěn dà. Gōngzuò de rén zǒu guòqù duì tā shuō「qǐng dào wàimiàn dǎ diànhuà.」Tā shuō「duìbuqǐ」, jiù chūqù le. Túshūguǎn yòu ānjìng le.
text_en: You can't talk in the library. A man was making a phone call, very loudly. A staff member walked over and said 'Please go outside to make your call.' He said 'Sorry' and went out. The library was quiet again.

questions.q_en: Can you talk in the library?
What was the man doing?
What did he do in the end?

title: The School Cafeteria
text_zh: 学校的食堂十一点半开门。十一点二十，门口已经有人在等了。我每天都十二点去，所以每天都要等。今天我十一点半就去了。前面只有三个人。我觉得很好。
text_pinyin: Xuéxiào de shítáng shíyī diǎn bàn kāimén. Shíyī diǎn èrshí, ménkǒu yǐjīng yǒu rén zài děng le. Wǒ měi tiān dōu shí èr diǎn qù, suǒyǐ měi tiān dōu yào děng. Jīntiān wǒ shíyī diǎn bàn jiù qù le. Qiánmiàn zhǐ yǒu sān gè rén. Wǒ juéde hěn hǎo.
text_en: The school cafeteria opens at 11:30. At 11:20, people are already waiting at the door. I usually go at twelve, so I always have to wait. Today I went at 11:30. Only three people were ahead of me. I thought that was great.

questions.q_en: What time does the cafeteria open?
What time does 'I' usually go?

questions.q_zh: 今天「我」去得早，前面有几个人？
questions.q_en: Today 'I' went early — how many people were ahead?

title: The Post Office Clock
text_zh: 我们这里的邮局有一个很大的钟。这个钟很老了，但是每天都很准。很多人走路的时候会看一下这个钟。我爸爸说「这个钟比我还老。」我觉得很有意思。
text_pinyin: Wǒmen zhèlǐ de yóujú yǒu yí gè hěn dà de zhōng. Zhège zhōng hěn lǎo le, dànshì měi tiān dōu hěn zhǔn. Hěn duō rén zǒulù de shíhou huì kàn yíxià zhège zhōng. Wǒ bàba shuō「zhège zhōng bǐ wǒ hái lǎo.」Wǒ juéde hěn yǒu yìsi.
text_en: The post office here has a very big clock. The clock is very old, but it's always accurate. Many people look at the clock when they walk by. My dad said 'This clock is even older than me.' I thought that was funny.

questions.q_en: What is this clock like?
Where is the clock?
What did dad say?

options.text_en: the clock is older than him

title: The Bank at Closing Time
text_zh: 银行四点半关门。现在四点二十了。一个女人跑进来，说「还能办吗？」工作的人说「能，快一点。」她坐下来，很快办好了。她说「谢谢你们，差一点就来不了了。」
text_pinyin: Yínháng sì diǎn bàn guānmén. Xiànzài sì diǎn èrshí le. Yí gè nǚrén pǎo jìnlái, shuō「hái néng bàn ma?」Gōngzuò de rén shuō「néng, kuài yìdiǎn.」Tā zuò xiàlái, hěn kuài bàn hǎo le. Tā shuō「xièxie nǐmen, chà yìdiǎn jiù lái bù liǎo le.」
text_en: The bank closes at 4:30. It's now 4:20. A woman ran in and said 'Can I still do it?' The staff said 'Yes, quickly.' She sat down and finished fast. She said 'Thank you — I almost didn't make it.'

questions.q_en: What time does the bank close?

questions.q_zh: 她来的时候还有多长时间？
questions.q_en: How much time was left when she arrived?
Did the staff let her do it?

title: My Name in Two Languages
text_zh: 我有两个名字。一个是中文名字，一个是英文名字。在家里，妈妈叫我的中文名字。在学校，老师叫我的英文名字。有时候我不知道哪个才是「真的我」。两个都是吧。
text_pinyin: Wǒ yǒu liǎng gè míngzi. Yí gè shì Zhōngwén míngzi, yí gè shì Yīngwén míngzi. Zài jiā lǐ, māma jiào wǒ de Zhōngwén míngzi. Zài xuéxiào, lǎoshī jiào wǒ de Yīngwén míngzi. Yǒu shíhou wǒ bù zhīdào nǎ ge cái shì「zhēn de wǒ」. Liǎng gè dōu shì ba.
text_en: I have two names. One is a Chinese name, one is an English name. At home, mom calls my Chinese name. At school, teachers call my English name. Sometimes I don't know which one is the 'real me.' Both of them, I suppose.

questions.q_en: Who uses the Chinese name at home?
How many names does 'I' have?
Which name does 'I' think is real?

title: What My Hands Know
text_zh: 我的手会做很多事。会写中文字，会做饭，会开车。但是我的手不会弹钢琴。我妈妈的手会。我看她弹的时候，觉得她的手和我的手不一样。
text_pinyin: Wǒ de shǒu huì zuò hěn duō shì. Huì xiě Zhōngwén zì, huì zuò fàn, huì kāi chē. Dànshì wǒ de shǒu bú huì tán gāngqín. Wǒ māma de shǒu huì. Wǒ kàn tā tán de shíhou, juéde tā de shǒu hé wǒ de shǒu bù yíyàng.
text_en: My hands can do many things. They can write Chinese characters, cook, and drive. But my hands can't play piano. My mom's hands can. When I watch her play, I feel that her hands and mine are different.

questions.q_en: What can't 'my' hands do?
Who can play piano?

questions.q_zh: 「我」看妈妈弹琴的时候觉得怎么样？
questions.q_en: How does 'I' feel watching mom play?

options.text: 觉得她的手和自己的不一样
options.pinyin: juéde tā de shǒu hé zìjǐ de bù yíyàng

title: The Photo from Before
text_zh: 我看到了一张十年以前的照片。照片里的人是我，但是我觉得不太像。那个时候我很瘦，头发很长。现在我不一样了。但是笑的样子，还是一样的。
text_pinyin: Wǒ kàn dào le yì zhāng shí nián yǐqián de zhàopiàn. Zhàopiàn lǐ de rén shì wǒ, dànshì wǒ juéde bú tài xiàng. Nà ge shíhou wǒ hěn shòu, tóufa hěn cháng. Xiànzài wǒ bù yíyàng le. Dànshì xiào de yàngzi, háishi yíyàng de.
text_en: I saw a photo from ten years ago. The person in the photo is me, but I feel it doesn't quite look like me. Back then I was thin, with long hair. Now I'm different. But the way I smile — that's still the same.

questions.q_en: When is the photo from?
What was 'I' like before?
What hasn't changed?

title: Speaking Chinese at the Store
text_zh: 我在一个中国商店买东西。我用中文说「这个多少钱？」那个人很高兴，用中文回答我。我又说了几句，他说「你的中文很好！」我知道还不太好，但是我很高兴能用中文买东西。
text_pinyin: Wǒ zài yí gè Zhōngguó shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi. Wǒ yòng Zhōngwén shuō「zhège duōshǎo qián?」Nà ge rén hěn gāoxìng, yòng Zhōngwén huídá wǒ. Wǒ yòu shuō le jǐ jù, tā shuō「nǐ de Zhōngwén hěn hǎo!」Wǒ zhīdào hái bú tài hǎo, dànshì wǒ hěn gāoxìng néng yòng Zhōngwén mǎi dōngxi.
text_en: I was buying things at a Chinese shop. I said in Chinese 'How much is this?' The person was happy and answered me in Chinese. I said a few more things, and he said 'Your Chinese is great!' I know it's not that good yet, but I was happy to be able to buy things in Chinese.

questions.q_en: What language did 'I' use to buy things?

questions.q_zh: 那个人说「我」的中文怎么样？
questions.q_en: What did the person say about 'my' Chinese?
Does 'I' think their own Chinese is good?

title: Dad's Noodles
text_zh: 我爸爸只会做一个菜——面条。但是他做的面条很好吃。他每个星期天都做。我们一家人坐在一起吃。我妈妈说「别的你都不会做，就这个好。」爸爸笑了。
text_pinyin: Wǒ bàba zhǐ huì zuò yí gè cài——miàntiáo. Dànshì tā zuò de miàntiáo hěn hǎochī. Tā měi ge xīngqītiān dōu zuò. Wǒmen yì jiā rén zuò zài yìqǐ chī. Wǒ māma shuō「bié de nǐ dōu bú huì zuò, jiù zhège hǎo.」Bàba xiào le.
text_en: My dad can only make one dish — noodles. But his noodles are delicious. He makes them every Sunday. Our whole family sits together and eats. My mom said 'You can't make anything else, just this one thing is good.' Dad smiled.

questions.q_en: How many dishes can dad make?
When does he make noodles?

questions.q_zh: 妈妈说的话是什么意思？
questions.q_en: What does mom's comment mean?

options.pinyin: bàba zuò fàn zuò de hěn hǎo

options.text: 只有面条做得好，别的不会
options.pinyin: zhǐ yǒu miàntiáo zuò de hǎo, bié de bú huì
options.text_en: only noodles are good, can't do the rest

title: Tea with Grandma
text_zh: 每次去奶奶家，她都会给我泡茶。她说「先坐下，喝杯茶。」我不太喜欢喝茶，但是在奶奶家我总是喝。因为喝茶的时候，我们可以慢慢说话。这个时间我很喜欢。
text_pinyin: Měi cì qù nǎinai jiā, tā dōu huì gěi wǒ pào chá. Tā shuō「xiān zuò xià, hē bēi chá.」Wǒ bú tài xǐhuan hē chá, dànshì zài nǎinai jiā wǒ zǒngshì hē. Yīnwèi hē chá de shíhou, wǒmen kěyǐ mànmàn shuō huà. Zhège shíjiān wǒ hěn xǐhuan.
text_en: Every time I go to grandma's house, she makes me tea. She says 'Sit down first, have a cup of tea.' I don't really like tea, but at grandma's house I always drink it. Because when we drink tea, we can talk slowly. I really like that time.

questions.q_en: Does 'I' like drinking tea?

questions.q_zh: 为什么「我」在奶奶家总是喝茶？
questions.q_en: Why does 'I' always drink tea at grandma's?
What does grandma tell 'me' to do first?

title: The Restaurant with One Table
text_zh: 这个饭馆很小，只有一张大桌子。不认识的人也坐在一起吃饭。今天我旁边坐了一个老人。他点了鱼。我点了面条。他看了我的面条说「看起来不错。」我说「你的鱼也很好。」
text_pinyin: Zhège fànguǎn hěn xiǎo, zhǐ yǒu yì zhāng dà zhuōzi. Bú rènshi de rén yě zuò zài yìqǐ chī fàn. Jīntiān wǒ pángbiān zuò le yí gè lǎorén. Tā diǎn le yú. Wǒ diǎn le miàntiáo. Tā kàn le wǒ de miàntiáo shuō「kàn qǐlái búcuò.」Wǒ shuō「nǐ de yú yě hěn hǎo.」
text_en: This restaurant is very small — just one big table. Strangers sit together to eat. Today an old man sat next to me. He ordered fish. I ordered noodles. He looked at my noodles and said 'That looks good.' I said 'Your fish looks good too.'

questions.q_en: How many tables does the restaurant have?
What did 'I' order?
Do the people sitting together know each other?

title: The Last Dumpling
text_zh: 桌子上还有一个饺子。我想吃，我朋友也想吃。我们看了看对方，都笑了。我说「你吃吧。」他说「不，你吃。」最后我们把饺子分成了两半，一人一半。
text_pinyin: Zhuōzi shang hái yǒu yí gè jiǎozi. Wǒ xiǎng chī, wǒ péngyou yě xiǎng chī. Wǒmen kàn le kàn duìfāng, dōu xiào le. Wǒ shuō「nǐ chī ba.」Tā shuō「bù, nǐ chī.」Zuìhòu wǒmen bǎ jiǎozi fēn chéng le liǎng bàn, yì rén yí bàn.
text_en: There's one dumpling left on the table. I want to eat it, and my friend does too. We looked at each other and both laughed. I said 'You eat it.' He said 'No, you eat it.' In the end we split the dumpling in two — half each.

questions.q_en: How many dumplings were left?
What did they do in the end?

questions.q_zh: 他们看对方的时候做了什么？
questions.q_en: What did they do when they looked at each other?
